# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: "security.istio.io/v1beta1"  # version of Istio security API to use (Istio V1Beta)  
kind: AuthorizationPolicy   
metadata:    
 name: service-accounts      
 namespace: default     
spec:        
 target:           // select all services in the given namespace            sourceSelector:  {}             destinationSelector: { kind : "Service", labelSelectors: [ 'app=myApp' ] }          ruleGroups: []              rules:    # access control for my service account       allow if true:   - action: ALLOW           from:     // any client IP address that is not part of the list. sourceSelector { namespace: "default", labels : {"istio-injection"="enabled"} }        matchExpressions: [  # HTTP method, path and headers          routeRule {}    httpRequestRules   - action: ALLOW       methods: ["POST"]     paths: "/v1/*/events/"             sourceSelectors { namespace : "default", labels : {"istio-injection"="enabled"} }
